This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] script-src should allow script by its url hash - header
  assert_equals: expected "SCRIPT_RAN" but got "CSP_VIOLATION"
[FAIL] A parseable url-hash should ignore hostname allowlists - header
  assert_equals: expected "CSP_VIOLATION" but got "SCRIPT_RAN"
[FAIL] default-src should allow script by its url hash - header
  assert_equals: expected "SCRIPT_RAN" but got "CSP_VIOLATION"
[FAIL] script-src-elem should allow script by its url hash - header
  assert_equals: expected "SCRIPT_RAN" but got "CSP_VIOLATION"
[FAIL] url hashes should allow dynamically inserted script if allowlisted - header
  assert_equals: expected "SCRIPT_RAN" but got "CSP_VIOLATION"
[FAIL] url hashes should allow redirected scripts - header
  assert_equals: expected "SCRIPT_RAN" but got "CSP_VIOLATION"
[FAIL] script-src should allow script by its url hash - metatag
  assert_equals: expected "SCRIPT_RAN" but got "CSP_VIOLATION"
[FAIL] A parseable url-hash should ignore hostname allowlists - metatag
  assert_equals: expected "CSP_VIOLATION" but got "SCRIPT_RAN"
[FAIL] default-src should allow script by its url hash - metatag
  assert_equals: expected "SCRIPT_RAN" but got "CSP_VIOLATION"
[FAIL] script-src-elem should allow script by its url hash - metatag
  assert_equals: expected "SCRIPT_RAN" but got "CSP_VIOLATION"
[FAIL] url hashes should allow dynamically inserted script if allowlisted - metatag
  assert_equals: expected "SCRIPT_RAN" but got "CSP_VIOLATION"
[FAIL] url hashes should allow redirected scripts - metatag
  assert_equals: expected "SCRIPT_RAN" but got "CSP_VIOLATION"
Harness: the test ran to completion.
